findings.text: From the window above Brek's desk she could see part of the square.
findings.deletionTest: Part of the square lay below Brek's desk window.
findings.reason: The sentence routes a simple sightline through Jaina's awareness instead of stating the visible field directly.
findings.suggestedFix: Part of the square lay below Brek's desk window.

audits.cleanReason: Tested the fragment clusters and compressed inferences most likely to drift into caption voice ("Strong enough.", "Always the gut.", "Same brown coat, same good prices, same pleasant face.", and "Nothing from the closet. Too quiet."). All read as Jaina's in-scene analytical shorthand or tactical alarm rather than an external narrator.

findings.text: Jaina moved from bed to bed with the crystal, fifteen seconds each, no treatment yet, only the shape of it.
findings.failedQuestion: What does this cash out to?
findings.missingPayload: The sentence avoids naming that Jaina is reading how far the contamination has spread through each patient.
findings.reason: The stand-in noun "shape" gestures at a diagnostic read without naming the actual payload.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina moved from bed to bed with the crystal, fifteen seconds each, no treatment yet, only how far it had spread.

audits.cleanReason: No exchange in the chapter sets up a plain-speech or smaller-words translation test, so this guide had no live candidates.

summary.verdictReason: Pass with warnings: 2 mild sentence-level kills, zero moderate/severe kills, and both remaining issues have low-difficulty drop-in fixes. Analytic hints still show structural rhythm concerns and a below-target texture profile for downstream revision.
